targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_prices AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol)
        symbol,
        close AS latest_close
    FROM stock_prices
    ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC
), yearly_range AS (
    SELECT
        symbol,
        MIN(low) AS low_52w
    FROM stock_prices
    WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '52 weeks'
    GROUP BY symbol
), ranked AS (
    SELECT
        lp.symbol AS ticker,
        COALESCE(t.name, lp.symbol) AS company_name,
        ((lp.latest_close - yr.low_52w) / yr.low_52w) * 100 AS pct_above_52w_low,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY ((lp.latest_close - yr.low_52w) / yr.low_52w) * 100 ASC, lp.symbol
        ) AS display_rank
    FROM latest_prices lp
    JOIN yearly_range yr ON yr.symbol = lp.symbol
    LEFT JOIN tickers t ON t.symbol = lp.symbol
    WHERE yr.low_52w IS NOT NULL AND yr.low_52w <> 0
)
SELECT
    ticker,
    company_name,
    pct_above_52w_low AS "% Above 52W Low",
    CASE WHEN MOD(display_rank, 2) = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 2 END AS bar_color_code
FROM ranked
ORDER BY pct_above_52w_low ASC, ticker
LIMIT 50

WITH latest_prices AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol)
        symbol,
        close AS latest_close
    FROM stock_prices
    ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC
), yearly_range AS (
    SELECT
        symbol,
        MIN(low) AS low_52w
    FROM stock_prices
    WHERE timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '52 weeks'
    GROUP BY symbol
), ranked AS (
    SELECT
        lp.symbol AS ticker,
        COALESCE(t.name, lp.symbol) AS company_name,
        ((lp.latest_close - yr.low_52w) / yr.low_52w) * 100 AS pct_above_52w_low,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            ORDER BY ((lp.latest_close - yr.low_52w) / yr.low_52w) * 100 ASC, lp.symbol
        ) AS display_rank
    FROM latest_prices lp
    JOIN yearly_range yr ON yr.symbol = lp.symbol
    LEFT JOIN tickers t ON t.symbol = lp.symbol
    WHERE yr.low_52w IS NOT NULL AND yr.low_52w <> 0
)
SELECT
    ticker,
    company_name,
    pct_above_52w_low AS "% Above 52W Low"
FROM ranked
ORDER BY pct_above_52w_low ASC, ticker
LIMIT 50

WITH latest_prices AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (symbol)
        symbol,
        timestamp AS latest_timestamp,
        close AS latest_close
    FROM stock_prices
    ORDER BY symbol, timestamp DESC
), prior_prices AS (
    SELECT
        lp.symbol,
        prior.close AS prior_close
    FROM latest_prices lp
    JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT close
        FROM stock_prices
        WHERE symbol = lp.symbol AND timestamp <= lp.latest_timestamp - INTERVAL '7 days'
        ORDER BY timestamp DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) prior ON TRUE
), returns AS (
    SELECT
        lp.symbol,
        COALESCE(t.name, lp.symbol) AS company_name,
        ((lp.latest_close - pp.prior_close) / pp.prior_close) * 100 AS return_pct
    FROM latest_prices lp
    JOIN prior_prices pp ON pp.symbol = lp.symbol
    LEFT JOIN tickers t ON t.symbol = lp.symbol
    WHERE pp.prior_close IS NOT NULL AND pp.prior_close <> 0
), ranked AS (
    SELECT
        symbol,
        company_name,
        return_pct,
        CASE WHEN return_pct >= 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS sort_bucket,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY CASE WHEN return_pct >= 0 THEN 'positive' ELSE 'negative' END
            ORDER BY CASE WHEN return_pct >= 0 THEN return_pct END DESC,
                     CASE WHEN return_pct < 0 THEN return_pct END ASC,
                     symbol
        ) AS side_rank
    FROM returns
)
SELECT
    symbol AS ticker,
    company_name,
    CASE WHEN return_pct >= 0 THEN return_pct END AS "Positive Change %",
    CASE WHEN return_pct < 0 THEN return_pct END AS "Negative Change %",
    CASE
        WHEN return_pct >= 0 AND MOD(side_rank, 2) = 1 THEN 1
        WHEN return_pct >= 0 THEN 2
        WHEN MOD(side_rank, 2) = 1 THEN 3
        ELSE 4
    END AS bar_color_code
FROM ranked
WHERE side_rank <= 20
ORDER BY sort_bucket, ABS(return_pct) DESC, ticker
